problem id: 143627c4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11000001 -> 10101111
  10011001 -> 10111011
  00100011 -> 01010111
  01011000 -> 11101001
  10110111 -> 11110010
  10000001 -> 10111111
  01010111 -> 11001011
  00110100 -> 01110010

query: 01011111
predicted answer: 11001001
